## Testing

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`pytest tests/ -q`)
- [ ] New tests added for new behavior
- [ ] Lint clean (`ruff check agentic_system tests examples`)

## Checklist

- [ ] No new `F401` / `F821` / `E402` ruff errors
- [ ] If new public API: docstring + type hints present
- [ ] If new optional extra: declared in `pyproject.toml` + `importorskip` in tests
- [ ] If docs changed: README or docstrings updated
